phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Left Arch is
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica o Arco Lateral Esquerdo?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo luh-tih-RAHL SHKEH-ruh-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Entrance-relative directions are standard for architectural sites.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Arco Lateral Esquerdo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo luh-tih-RAHL SHKEH-ruh-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Left Side Arch.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Left Side Arch.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo luh-tih-RAHL SHKEH-ruh-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Arco Lateral Esquerdo.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes para os passeios marítimos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh OOSH puh-SAYOOSH muh-REE-tee-moosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte no Posto de Turismo, ali na praça. Eles indicam o local exato.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo, uh-LEE NUH PRAH-suh. EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the Tourist Office, there in the square. They will tell you the exact location.

responses.english: Ask at the Tourist Office, there in the square. They will tell you the exact location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo, uh-LEE NUH PRAH-suh. EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
responses.french: Pergunte no Posto de Turismo, ali na praça. Eles indicam o local exato.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Left Arch is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Arco Lateral Esquerdo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo luh-tih-RAHL SHKEH-ruh-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The arches are part of the historic city gates of Ponta Delgada, dating from 1783.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, à esquerda do Arco Central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh DOO AH-ruh-koo sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, to the left of the Main Arch.

responses.english: Good morning, to the left of the Main Arch.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh DOO AH-ruh-koo sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, à esquerda do Arco Central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Main Arch is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o Arco Central exatamente?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW AH-ruh-koo sayngt-RAHL eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals use clear landmark references to guide visitors efficiently.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no centro da estrutura histórica.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DUH shtroo-TOO-ruh eesh-TAW-ree-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the center of the historical structure.

responses.english: Good morning, in the center of the historical structure.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DUH shtroo-TOO-ruh eesh-TAW-ree-kuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no centro da estrutura histórica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the 1783 inscription
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver a inscrição de 1783?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR AH eensk-ree-SOWN DIH MEEL-seh-tih-sayng-too-zheeoy-tayng-tuheet-rehsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Visibility cues are added to manage visitor expectations accurately.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na base do arco, bem visível.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH BAH-zih DOO AH-ruh-koo, BAYNG vee-ZEE-vehl.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the base of the arch, clearly visible.

responses.english: Good morning, at the base of the arch, clearly visible.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH BAH-zih DOO AH-ruh-koo, BAYNG vee-ZEE-vehl.
responses.french: Bom dia, na base do arco, bem visível.

phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah een-skree-SOW jee meel seh-teh-SEN-toos ee oh-EEN-tah ee TRAYS
phrases.cultural_note: Direct spatial references are standard in Portuguese tourist interactions.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na fachada principal, junto ao arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH fuh-SHAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, ZHOONNG-too OW AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the main facade, near the arch.

responses.english: Good morning, on the main facade, near the arch.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH fuh-SHAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, ZHOONNG-too OW AH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, na fachada principal, junto ao arco.

phrases.text_local: Onde encontro a bilheteira dos passeios marítimos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOOSH puh-SAYOOSH muh-REE-tee-moosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte no Posto de Turismo ou a um Guia de passeios marítimos para obter informações sobre a bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo OHW AH OONNG GEEUH DIH puh-SAYOOSH muh-REE-tee-moosh PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the Tourist Office or a Boat tour guide for information about the ticket window.

responses.english: Ask at the Tourist Office or a Boat tour guide for information about the ticket window.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo OHW AH OONNG GEEUH DIH puh-SAYOOSH muh-REE-tee-moosh PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Pergunte no Posto de Turismo ou a um Guia de passeios marítimos para obter informações sobre a bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy boat tour tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde compro bilhetes para o passeio de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih KOHMP-roo bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO DIH BAH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Specific facility names are used to avoid confusion at busy ports.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia de passeios marítimos.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH DIH puh-SAYOOSH muh-REE-tee-moosh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH DIH puh-SAYOOSH muh-REE-tee-moosh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia de passeios marítimos.
